translation.literal_translation: If it be said 'No, due to jiva and main-prana indicators,' no - because of threefold upasana, because they are dependent (on Brahman), and because here they are connected with That. (31)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.1.31: jiva/mukhya-prana lingas do not negate Brahman-reference, as they function as dependent upadhi-modes within tri-fold Brahman-upasana.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra closes the Kausitaki reconciliation by integrating all indicators under one referent.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S01 pass with stable inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit truncated Kausitaki argument lines and detailed phrasing around upasa-traividhya in records 1.1.101-1.1.103.
